title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE PEOPLE'S HOMESITE AND HOUSING CORPORATION TO ACQUIRE THAT CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND IN BARRIO PANSOL, QUEZON CITY, OWNED BY THE NATIONAL WATERWORKS AND SEWERAGE AUTHORITY TO BE SUBDIVIDED AND SOLD TOBONA FIDEOCCUPANTS THEREOF.

chunks.text:
H. No. 17846 / 63 OG No. 10, 2122 (March 6, 1967)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4640, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE PEOPLE'S HOMESITE AND HOUSING CORPORATION TO ACQUIRE THAT CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND IN BARRIO PANSOL, QUEZON CITY, OWNED BY THE NATIONAL WATERWORKS AND SEWERAGE AUTHORITY TO BE SUBDIVIDED AND SOLD TO

BONA FIDE

OCCUPANTS THEREOF.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The People's Homesite and Housing CorporaÂtion is hereby authorized to acquire that certain parcel of land situated in Barrio Pansol, Quezon City, owned by the National Waterworks and Sewerage Authority, and subdivide the same into lots which shall be sold to

bona fide

occupants thereof.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
